prompt: Match the map's palette to desert sunset tones
prompt_refined: Edit image 2, the USA National Parks map. Update the color palette of the map's landmass (the green-filled continental USA and islands) to reflect the vibrant and striking desert sunset tones from image 1. Specifically, replace the current green with a gradient or selection of colors featuring the purples, pinks, oranges, and deep blues prominent in the sky and sand of image 1, while ensuring all geographical features, text labels, and park icons on the map remain highly visible and distinct.
objects: Continental USA landmass with purples, pinks, oranges, and deep blues
USA-associated islands (e.g., Hawaii, Alaska) with purples, pinks, oranges, and deep blues
Geographical features on map (e.g., state borders, coastlines)
